hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) expands the Asia session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) directionally; a close beyond the Asia high/low by >= 0.4*ATR with strong body captures the expansion, provided Asia range is 0.5-2.0 ATR and ATR percentile is above median (avoid dead days).

signals.entry_long: time in [07:00,10:00] UTC AND close > asia_high + 0.4*atr(14) AND (close-open) >= 0.8*atr(14) AND first_breakout_of_day
signals.entry_short: time in [07:00,10:00] UTC AND close < asia_low - 0.4*atr(14) AND (open-close) >= 0.8*atr(14) AND first_breakout_of_day

falsification: If trades < 200 over 4.5y IS, session logic is too strict — relax body filter to 0.6*ATR. If PF < 1.5, reject.
